summary: Completed testing of GPS functionality and Unsplash spot images. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - GPS button on Map page, filter tabs, and Popular Spots grid with Unsplash images all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GPS check-in API properly uses Haversine formula to find nearest spot
Check-in with use_gps=true correctly identifies Sebastian Inlet from GPS coordinates
Spot image update API (PATCH /api/surf-spots/{spot_id}/image) working correctly
17 surf spots have Unsplash images after seeding
Explore page Popular Spots grid displays images correctly
Map page has GPS Navigation button in top-right position (x=1856)
Filter tabs (All, Surf Spots, Photographers) visible and functional on Map page
seed_data_creation: Created multiple GPS test users during backend testing (gps_test_*, haversine_test_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS features fully tested. Test user has already checked in today. Sebastian Inlet coordinates: 27.8567, -80.4489. GPS check-in within 10km auto-selects nearest spot. Spot images seeded from Unsplash.

verified_features.gps_checkin_api_with_haversine: PASS - POST /api/check-in with use_gps=true finds Sebastian Inlet from nearby coordinates
verified_features.gps_checkin_custom_location_fallback: PASS - GPS check-in >10km from spots uses 'Custom Location'
verified_features.surf_spots_have_unsplash_images: PASS - 17+ spots have Unsplash image URLs
verified_features.explore_page_popular_spots_grid: PASS - 4 trending spots displayed with Unsplash images
verified_features.map_page_gps_button: PASS - Navigation button at x=1856 (top-right) with data-testid='gps-location-btn'
verified_features.map_page_filter_tabs: PASS - All, Surf Spots, Photographers tabs visible and functional

map_page: Filter tabs: All, Surf Spots, Photographers
